description: Oracle Analytics Desktop is open on the Windows desktop. Using the dataset 'order_lines.csv' located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\OracleAnalyticsData\order_lines.csv, create a new workbook. Generate a Vertical Bar Chart showing 'Profit' by 'Product Category'. Apply a filter to the workbook so that only data for the 'Regular Air' 'Ship Mode' is displayed. Save the workbook with the name 'filtered_profit_report'.
